notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. TJ Rumfield out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Karros GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Gonzales to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Ezequiel Tovar out at 2nd. Kyle Karros out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Braxton Fulford pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Braxton Fulford doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jake Mangum. Tyler Freeman scores. Cole Carrigg scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Lowe reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Ezequiel Tovar. Henry Davis to 3rd. Henry Davis advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by shortstop Ezequiel Tovar.

notableEvents.label: Bryan Reynolds pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds singles on a ground ball to center fielder Cole Carrigg. Jared Triolo scores.

notableEvents.label: Jared Triolo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pirates challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Pirates challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Jared Triolo grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Willi Castro to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Endy Rodríguez out at 2nd. Jared Triolo out at 1st.
